TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Seveng, title = Seveng, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Seveng} }

S.FORM: alang Seveng ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Haruhi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 90 buwan, 401 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 395 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 97%, Bunun 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Seveng hya' ga Kuabar. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu

alang Seveng ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Haruhi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 90 buwan, 401 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 395 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 97%, Bunun 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'zil na Seveng hya' ga Kuabar. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕe*eŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu ħaruħi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, βunun *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔzil na s~ɕe*eŋ ħjaʔ ɣa kuaβar. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu
